title: Size adjustable light emitting diode light system with three light projection planes
abstract: A size adjustable LED light system has a first and second light retainer that are configured as mirror images to retain a front LED light strip of variable heights and lengths. Also, each of the first and second light retainer form a side LED light receiver channel configured to receive a side LED light. The front extensions of each of the light retainers create a barrier between the front LED light strip and the side LED light, to enable different colors of light to be projected from the front and the two sides. The first and second light retainers have front panel channel for retaining a front panel of the front LED light strip and side panel channels for retaining a side panel over the respective side LED light or side LED light panel.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1 . A size adjustable LED light system comprising: a) a first light retainer and a second light retainer, each comprising: i) a front LED strip channel; ii) a front extension; iii) a side panel, iv) a side LED light receiver channel configured on an opposing side of the light retainer from the front LED strip channel; wherein the front extension extends to an extended end and comprises a side panel channel and a front panel channel; b) a front LED light strip, comprising a front LED light that is retained in and extends between the front LED strip channel of each of the first light retainer and the second light retainer; c) a front panel extending between the front panel channel of the front extension of the first light retainer and the second light retainer and over the front LED light strip; wherein light emitted from the front LED light is configured to project through the front panel; d) a first side LED light strip, comprising a first side LED light, that is configured in a first side LED light receiver channel of the first light retainer and configured to emit light from said first side LED light receiver channel of said first light retainer; wherein said side panel of the first light retainer extends between the side panel channel of the front extension of the first light retainer and over the first side LED light strip; wherein light emitted from the first side LED light is configured to project through the side panel of the first light retainer; and wherein the first light retainer and second light retainer are configured to receive said front LED light strip and said front panel of different heights. 2. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the front panel and side panels are translucent. 3. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 2, wherein the front LED light of the front LED light strip and the first side LED light of the first side LED light strip are configured to emit different color light. 4. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , further comprising: a) a second side LED light strip, comprising a second side LED configured to emit light from the second side LED light receiver channel of the second light retainer; and b) a second side panel extending between the side panel channel of the front extension of the second LED light retainer; and wherein light emitted from the second side LED light is configured to project through the second side panel. 5. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 4, wherein the second side panel is translucent. 6. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 5, wherein the front LED light of the front LED light strip, the first side LED light of the first side LED light strip, and the second LED light of the second LED light strip are configured to emit different color light. 7. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 6, wherein the first side LED light strip is flexible. 8. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the first light retainer and second light retainer are configured as mirror images of each other across a centerline. 9. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the first light retainer and second light retainer are each made of extruded plastic. 10. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the front LED light of the front LED light strip and the first side LED light of the first side LED light strip are configured to emit different color light. 11 .The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the front LED light of the front LED light strip and the first side LED light of the first side LED light strip emit light that is 1 ,500 lumens or more in brightness. 12. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the front LED light strip and the first side LED light strip each comprise a plurality of LED lights. 13. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the front extension of each of the first and second light retainers extend at an extension angle between 10 and 60 degrees. 14. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the front LED light strip has a plurality of front LED lights, with two or more configured between the front LED light strip channel of the first and second light retainers. 15. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the front LED light strip is rigid. 16. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the first light retainer and second light retainer are both monolithic parts. 17. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein the first light retainer and second light retainer are flexible and wherein the size adjustable LED light extends in an arc between a first end and second end. 18. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , further comprising an endplate configured to detachably attach to an end of the first light retainer and the second light retainer. 19. The size adjustable LED light system of claim 1 , wherein each of the first light retainer and the second light retainer further comprise an alignment groove.
